description: AI-powered credit research memo generation with comprehensive data gathering, credit analysis, and formal memo writing for institutional credit decisions

agents.name: Data Gatherer
agents.description: Collects financial statements, market data, industry benchmarks, and regulatory filings to build a comprehensive credit profile for the target entity

agents.name: Credit Analyst
agents.description: Performs quantitative credit analysis including ratio computation, peer comparison, risk factor identification, and credit rating assessment

agents.name: Memo Writer
agents.description: Generates formal credit research memos with structured sections, rating recommendations, and institutional-grade documentation
